name: document_controller_download_specific_revision_of_document_from_cde_platform
desc: Downloads a specific revision of a document from any connected CDE platform. Returns the local file path of the downloaded PDF/DWG.

parameters.name: revision
parameters.description: Revision to download (e.g. P02, C01). Omit for latest.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Platform to download from: vfp, asite, acc
